name: Rheinmetall AG
description: Rheinmetall AG is an international technology group specializing in security and mobility. Headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany, the company operates through two main segments: Rheinmetall Defence and Rheinmetall Automotive. The Defence segment is a leading European systems supplier for defense and security technology, producing armored vehicles, weapons, ammunition, air defense systems, and defense electronics. The Automotive segment (operating under the Pierburg and Kolbenschmidt brands) develops and manufactures components and systems for engine efficiency, emissions reduction, and e-mobility.
